# Orionfold

> Orionfold helps small teams own the AI capabilities they are already trying
> to buy: private agents, domain models, benchmarks, and playbooks that run on
> hardware the customer controls. Everything is open and built on real,
> working code. Orionfold is a member of NVIDIA Inception.

## Flagship paths
- [Advisor](https://orionfold.com/advisor/): Ask Orionfold privately. Orionfold Advisor is a governed local AI advisor over your own documents: every answer names its exact source, unsupported questions get a refusal, and every check it passed is a receipt you can re-run. Live; the trained model is free on Hugging Face.
- [Workflows](https://orionfold.com/workflows/): Private Agent Starter Kits. One local workflow with a trigger, runner, evaluation, approval loop, artifact output, and audit trail.
- [Experts](https://orionfold.com/experts/): Offline domain models with benchmarks and playbooks for sensitive work. Patent Strategist is the live flagship pack.
- [Cockpit](https://orionfold.com/cockpit/): Orionfold Arena is the cockpit for local AI. Cortex memory and the fieldkit toolkit are the stack around it.
- [Learn](https://orionfold.com/learn/): Books, field notes, the DGX Spark Field Lab, and build stories that teach the operating model.

## Proof libraries
- [Software](https://orionfold.com/software/): Open software to run private AI workflows. Orionfold Advisor, Arena, and Cortex lead the catalog, with the AI Native Platform and API, apps, and developer tools behind them.
- [Models](https://orionfold.com/models/): Open-weight AI models tuned for patents, security, law, finance, medicine, and space math. Free to download and run offline.
- [DGX Spark](https://orionfold.com/dgx-spark/): Built on the NVIDIA stack. The book, open models, and tools all proven on the NVIDIA DGX Spark, a small AI supercomputer that runs on one desk with no cloud.
- [Books](https://orionfold.com/books/): Implementation playbooks. The AI Native Business book, AI research on the NVIDIA DGX Spark, and Field Notes. Built on working code.
- [Story](https://orionfold.com/story/): Building in public. Honest notes on what we shipped, what broke, and what we learned.
- [Adoption](https://orionfold.com/adoption/): What is shipped, what is being built, and what sponsors can fund next.

## More
- [GitHub](https://github.com/manavsehgal): Source code and open projects.
- [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/Orionfold): Open-weight models to download.

## Optional
- [Privacy](https://orionfold.com/privacy/): How we handle data.
- [Terms](https://orionfold.com/terms/): Terms of use.
